insight_events.summary: Warren Buffett confirmed he personally initiated Berkshire Hathaway's $31 billion investment in Alphabet, admitting he should have invested years earlier. The position includes $21 billion in public shares and a $10 billion private placement from Alphabet's $80 billion equity raise. Buffett expressed confidence in Alp...

insight_events.title: Alphabet vs. Apple: Which Warren Buffett Favorite Is the Better Stock to Buy Today?
insight_events.summary: Warren Buffett holds positions in both Apple and Alphabet.
